nasb.text: So Moab was subdued that day under the hand of Israel. And the land was undisturbed for eighty years.

esv.text: So Moab was subdued that day under the hand of Israel. And the land had rest for eighty years.

cnv.text: 這樣，從那天起，摩押就在以色列人的手下被制伏了，於是國中太平了八十年。

ccb.text: 这样，以色列人征服了摩押人，国中安享太平八十年。
